serverInfo.name: atlas
serverInfo.title: Atlas — Text-to-SQL Data Analyst
serverInfo.description: Atlas MCP server. Connects an MCP-compatible client (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Zed) to your data warehouse via Atlas's text-to-SQL agent. Read-only by default; every query is AST-validated against a YAML semantic layer and table whitelist.

tools.name: executeSQL
tools.description: Run a read-only SELECT against a connected datasource. Validates against the semantic-layer whitelist.

tools.name: explore
tools.description: Read-only filesystem access (ls / cat / grep / find) over the semantic layer YAML.

tools.name: executePython
tools.description: Run sandboxed Python (nsjail / Vercel sandbox / sidecar) for chart rendering and analysis.
